hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold text-slate-900

typography.rules: Headlines MUST use tracking-tight. Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.

hotspot_states.default: border-2 border-white/80 bg-slate-900/10 hover:bg-slate-900/20 backdrop-blur-sm transition-colors

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Grid Borders strategy. grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-0 border-collapse border border-border/40
layout_and_spacing.canvas_area: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 h-[80vh] min-h-[600px] overflow-hidden bg-slate-100 relative
layout_and_spacing.sidebar_area: col-span-1 border-l border-border/40 p-6 bg-white overflow-y-auto h-[80vh]
layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: Generous Spacing: p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers to prevent collision. p-12 for section gaps.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Mobile-first responsive grids.

components.canvas: Use react-zoom-pan-pinch to wrap the main exam image. The image acts as the coordinate system map. Hotspots map onto this image using percentage-based x, y, width, height relative to the image wrapper.
components.hotspots: Absolute positioned elements within the relative image wrapper. Support rectangular, circular (rounded-full), and polygon (via clip-path or SVG) overlays.
components.question_modal: Shadcn Dialog. Flat solid surface, 1px border. DO NOT use Glassmorphism to prevent visual refraction of quiz data.
components.admin_forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Button. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow on default, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on hover.
components.general: Do NOT use generic HTML for interactions. Always use shadcn forms. Include data-testid on every interactive element.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicit text color on hover. transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interaction.modal_entrance: Framer motion scale-in for the question modal.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have higher contrast.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Outfit and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
Build the interactive image hotspot UI using react-zoom-pan-pinch.
Hotspots must be positioned via percentages to adapt to scaling, and styled strictly per the colors.hotspot_states specification.
Implement the control room grid for the admin canvas editor. The canvas takes 75% of width, tools take 25%.
Strictly avoid Material UI (MUI). Use Tailwind and Shadcn purely.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the modal or overlays over the image; use solid white for readability.
Use the provided image URLs in the seed data for exam previews and landing page backgrounds.
